paragraphs.title: 1. Carga y utilidades
paragraphs.text:
%pyspark
import json
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix, classification_report

HDFS = "hdfs://namenode:9000"


def listar_ficheros(path_dir):
    jvm = sc._jvm
    conf = sc._jsc.hadoopConfiguration()
    fs = jvm.org.apache.hadoop.fs.FileSystem.get(conf)
    path = jvm.org.apache.hadoop.fs.Path(path_dir)
    if not fs.exists(path):
        return []
    rutas = []
    for estado in fs.listStatus(path):
        nombre = estado.getPath().getName()
        if estado.isFile() and nombre.startswith('part-'):
            rutas.append(estado.getPath().toString())
    return sorted(rutas)


def leer_json_desde_directorio(path_dir):
    try:
        rutas = listar_ficheros(path_dir)
        if not rutas:
            print(f"No hay ficheros JSON en {path_dir}")
            return None
        texto = "\n".join(
            row['value']
            for row in spark.read.text(rutas).collect()
            if row['value'] and row['value'].strip()
        ).strip()
        if not texto:
            print(f"No hay contenido JSON legible en {path_dir}")
            return None
        return json.loads(texto)
    except Exception as exc:
        print(f"No se pudieron leer metricas desde {path_dir}: {exc}")
        return None


def cm_desde_preds(preds_df):
    pdf = preds_df.select('label', 'prediction').toPandas()
    cm = confusion_matrix(pdf['label'], pdf['prediction'])
    reporte = classification_report(pdf['label'], pdf['prediction'], target_names=['Clean', 'Explicit'])
    return cm, reporte


def pintar_cm(cm, titulo):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5, 4))
    ax.imshow(cm, interpolation='nearest', cmap='Blues')
    ax.set_title(titulo)
    ax.set_xticks(np.arange(2))
    ax.set_xticklabels(['Clean', 'Explicit'])
    ax.set_yticks(np.arange(2))
    ax.set_yticklabels(['Clean', 'Explicit'])
    ax.set_xlabel('Predicho')
    ax.set_ylabel('Real')
    for i in range(cm.shape[0]):
        for j in range(cm.shape[1]):
            ax.text(j, i, str(cm[i, j]), ha='center', va='center', color='white' if cm[i, j] > cm.max() / 2 else 'black', fontweight='bold')
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()


metricas_w2v = leer_json_desde_directorio(f"{HDFS}/metrics/word2vec_mlp/")
metricas_use_mllib = leer_json_desde_directorio(f"{HDFS}/metrics/spark_nlp_use_mllib_mlp/")
metricas_sparknlp = leer_json_desde_directorio(f"{HDFS}/metrics/spark_nlp_classifierdl/")
metricas_tf = leer_json_desde_directorio(f"{HDFS}/metrics/tensorflow_text_baselines/")

resultados_tf = metricas_tf.get('results', []) if metricas_tf else []
mejor_tf = max(resultados_tf, key=lambda x: x.get('f1_weighted', 0.0)) if resultados_tf else None

try:
    import sparknlp
    from sparknlp.base import DocumentAssembler
    from sparknlp.annotator import UniversalSentenceEncoder
    from pyspark.ml import Pipeline, PipelineModel
    from pyspark.ml.classification import MultilayerPerceptronClassificationModel
    from pyspark.ml.functions import array_to_vector
    from pyspark.sql import functions as F
    HAS_SPARKNLP = True
except Exception as exc:
    HAS_SPARKNLP = False
    SPARKNLP_IMPORT_ERROR = str(exc)

print('Word2Vec + MLP:', metricas_w2v is not None)
print('USE + MLlib MLP:', metricas_use_mllib is not None)
print('Spark NLP ClassifierDL:', metricas_sparknlp is not None)
print('TensorFlow:', metricas_tf is not None)
print('Spark NLP en Zeppelin:', HAS_SPARKNLP)

paragraphs.title: 2. Modelo 03 - Word2Vec + MLP
paragraphs.text:
%pyspark
print(json.dumps(metricas_w2v, indent=2) if metricas_w2v else 'Metricas no disponibles')

if metricas_w2v:
    test_base = spark.read.parquet(f"{HDFS}/data/processed/test/").select('text', 'label')
    from pyspark.ml import PipelineModel
    modelo_w2v = PipelineModel.load(f"{HDFS}/models/word2vec_mlp/")
    preds_w2v = modelo_w2v.transform(test_base).select('label', 'prediction')
    cm, reporte = cm_desde_preds(preds_w2v)
    pintar_cm(cm, 'Nivel 1 - Word2Vec + MLP')
    print(reporte)

paragraphs.title: 3. Modelo 07 - USE + MLlib MLP
paragraphs.text:
%pyspark
print(json.dumps(metricas_use_mllib, indent=2) if metricas_use_mllib else 'Metricas no disponibles')

if metricas_use_mllib and HAS_SPARKNLP:
    test_base = spark.read.parquet(f"{HDFS}/data/processed/test/").select('text', 'label')
    document = DocumentAssembler().setInputCol('text').setOutputCol('document')
    use = UniversalSentenceEncoder.pretrained('tfhub_use', 'en').setInputCols(['document']).setOutputCol('sentence_embeddings')
    emb_model = Pipeline(stages=[document, use]).fit(test_base.limit(1))
    test_feat = (emb_model.transform(test_base)
                 .withColumn('features', array_to_vector(F.col('sentence_embeddings').getItem(0)['embeddings']))
                 .select('features', 'label'))
    mlp_model = MultilayerPerceptronClassificationModel.load(f"{HDFS}/models/spark_nlp_use_mllib_mlp/")
    preds_use_mllib = mlp_model.transform(test_feat).select('label', 'prediction')
    cm, reporte = cm_desde_preds(preds_use_mllib)
    pintar_cm(cm, 'Nivel 2 - USE + MLlib MLP')
    print(reporte)
elif metricas_use_mllib:
    print('Metricas cargadas, pero Zeppelin no tiene Spark NLP para reconstruir la matriz de confusion')

paragraphs.title: 4. Modelo 05 - Spark NLP ClassifierDL
paragraphs.text:
%pyspark
print(json.dumps(metricas_sparknlp, indent=2) if metricas_sparknlp else 'Metricas no disponibles')
print('\nNota: este modelo se muestra como experimento Spark NLP. Si no hay metricas, el entrenamiento no llego a completarse en el entorno actual.')

paragraphs.title: 5. TensorFlow - Mejor baseline
6. Comparativa final
paragraphs.text:
%pyspark
modelos = []
accuracy = []
f1_weighted = []
f1_macro = []
auc = []

for nombre, fuente in [
    ('Nivel 1', metricas_w2v),
    ('Nivel 2', metricas_use_mllib),
    ('Nivel 3', metricas_sparknlp),
    ('Nivel 4', mejor_tf),
]:
    if fuente:
        modelos.append(nombre)
        accuracy.append(fuente.get('accuracy') or 0.0)
        f1_weighted.append(fuente.get('f1_weighted') or 0.0)
        f1_macro.append(fuente.get('f1_macro') or 0.0)
        auc.append(fuente.get('auc_roc') or 0.0)

if not modelos:
    print('No hay metricas disponibles para comparar')
else:
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 4, figsize=(22, 5))
    series = [('accuracy', accuracy), ('f1_weighted', f1_weighted), ('f1_macro', f1_macro), ('auc_roc', auc)]
    for ax, (titulo, valores) in zip(axes, series):
        bars = ax.bar(modelos, valores, color=['#1f77b4', '#2ca02c', '#e4572e', '#9467bd'][:len(modelos)])
        ax.set_title(titulo)
        ax.set_ylim(0, 1.05)
        ax.grid(axis='y', alpha=0.25)
        for bar, valor in zip(bars, valores):
            ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, bar.get_height() + 0.015, f'{valor:.3f}', ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
